reviews.review_description: A very atmospheric game, educational and relaxing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Hope you continue to enjoy our game in future updates.

reviews.review_description: Very relaxing and also enjoy the Majongg game! Please continue updating. The graphics are well done as well. Five stars if the developers continue to update.
I absolutely love this please hurry and add more please 3 is not enough when more comes I will definitely give it five stars

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback! We are working on new exciting episodes and on a second coloring mode in which you can paint miniatures yourself.

reviews.review_description:
Pretty fun and perfect for getting ready for bed!
I think you will like it
